calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: MATTER COMES ON CALENDAR FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.ACTION SETTLED, AS SET FORTH IN STIPULATION SIGNED AND FILED THIS DATE, AS FOLLOWS:IT IS HEREBY STIPULATED AND AGREED BY AND BETWEEN PLTD, FP 200L CO., AND DEFENDANTS, ERICK SANCHEZ AND ALISON SCHULTZ, THAT THE DEFTS SHALL MAKE PAYMENTS TO PLTF ACCORDING TO THE FOLLOWING SCHEDULE: $7585.00 ON OR BEFORE AUGUST 2, 2004;$1195.00 ON OR BEFORE AUGUST 16, 2004;THEREAFER, DEFTS SHALL PAY THEIR MONTHLY RENT ON OR BEFORE THE THIRD DAY OF EACH MONTH. DEFTS SHALL INCLUDE A MINIMUM MONTHLY PAYMENT OF $100.00;SAID ADDITIONAL PAYMENTS SHALL CONTINUE UNTILL THE SUM OF $600.00 HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL.DEFTS SHALL BE REINSTATED AS TENANTS IN GOOD STANDING BY MAKING PAYMENTS OF $7585.00;$1195.00, AND $600.00. AT SUCH TIME, AND UPON WRITTEN DEMAND TO PLTF'S CSL BY DEFT OR DEFTS' ATTORNEY, PLTF SHALL FILE A DISMISSAL OF THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLTF SHALL WAIVE ANY OTHER ATTY FEES OR COURT COSTS. IF, FOR ANY REASON, DEFTS FAIL TO MAKE ANY PAYMENT REQUIRED ABOVE, PLTF MAY HAVE AN IMMEDIATE JUDGMENT FOR THE FULL RELIEF SET FORTH IN THE PRAYER OF THE COMPLAINT, INCLUDING RESTITUTION OF POSSESSION OF THE SUBJECT PREMISES, RENT, DMAGES, ATTY FEES AND COSTS, LESS APPLICABLE CREDITS FOR ANY PAYMENTS MADE BY DEFTS PRIOR TO THE DATE UON WHICH SUCH JUDGEMNT IS OBTAINED. PLTF MAY OBTAIN SAID JUDGMENT BY EX PARTE APPLICATION TO THIS COURT, WITH A DECL UNDER PENALTY OF PERJURY SETTING FORTH THE FACTS OF DEFTS' FAILURE TO ABIDE BY THE TERMS OF THIS STIPULATION.24 HOURS TELEPHONE NOTICE. THE FIRST TWO PAYEMENTS ARE TO BE IN THE FORM OF CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER MADE TO MANAGER'S OFFICE. SHOULD ANY PERSONAL CHECK BE DISHONORED FOR ANY REASON, IT SHALL ACT AS IF NO PAYMENT WAS RECEIVED.
